query:
SELECT id, stage, LEFT(messageHistory, 600) as history FROM conversation_sessions WHERE id = 990004;
SELECT id, customerRating FROM cleaner_jobs WHERE customerPhone = '+13029816191' OR id IN (SELECT cleanerJobId FROM rating_sms_pending WHERE customerPhone = '+13029816191') LIMIT 5;
